sensors.name: Typecheck
sensors.description: Strict TypeScript type checking with no emit (tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit).

sensors.name: Test
sensors.description: Run the Vitest suite once (vitest run). Must never invoke real Codex or Claude Code.

sensors.name: Build
sensors.description: Compile TypeScript sources to dist/ and emit the bmh CLI entrypoint.
